NVIDIA Q4 Results: AI Chip Maker Posts Another Blowout Quarter

By James Chen | February 27, 2025 | Bloomberg

NVIDIA Corp. once again crushed Wall Street expectations in its fiscal Q4 2025, reporting data-center revenue of $18.4 billion, a 93% year-over-year increase. Total revenue came in at $22.1 billion.

CEO Jensen Huang reiterated the company's optimistic outlook, saying demand for AI computing remains robust across hyperscale cloud providers and enterprise customers. Gross margins expanded to 76%.

The company guided for Q1 fiscal 2026 revenue of approximately $24 billion, above the consensus estimate of $22.8 billion.

Analysts remain broadly positive. "The results confirm the AI infrastructure buildout is still in early stages," said a note from Bank of America.

NVIDIA shares were up 2% in extended trading.
